event: I attended the IEEE VIS 2025 conference in Vienna and presented one workshop paper and one poster.np
Our paper - TangibleNet: Synchronous Network Data Storytelling through Tangible Interactions in Augmented Reality has been accepted by ACM CHI 2025. Congrats to Kentaro Takahira!
Our paper - InterLink: LinkingText with Code and Output in Computational Notebooks has been accepted by ACM CHI 2025. Congrats to Yanna Lin!

Our paper - From Reader to Experiencer: Design and Evaluation of an Interactive Vr Story for Promoting the Situation Awareness of Public Health Threats has been accepted by IJHCI. Congrats to Qian Zhu!
I gave a talk at the SIGCHI Paris Chapter - Communicate data insights engagingly and immersively with visual data storytelling
I co-orgnized IEEE VIS 2024 Workshop on Data Storytelling in an Era of Generative AI.
I am honored to sever as the Secretary General of the Organizing Committee of ChinaVis 2024, held at Hong Kong.
I joined the team Bivwac, Inria Bordeaux, as a Postdoc researcher.
I gave a talk at the IEEE VIS 2023 panel - Establishing and Thriving in an Academic Career.

Our paper - From Reader to Experiencer: Design and Evaluation of an Interactive Vr Story for Promoting the Situation Awareness of Public Health Threats has been accepted by IJHCI. Congrats to Qian Zhu!
Our paper - Why Change My Design: Explaining Poorly Constructed Visualization Designs with Explorable Explanations has been accepted by IEEE VIS 2023. Congrats to Leo Yu‑Ho Lo!
Our paper - InkSight: Leveraging Sketch Interaction for Documenting Chart Findings in Computational Notebooks has been accepted by IEEE VIS 2023. Congrats to Yanna Lin!
Attend the ACM CHI 2023 conference.
Our paper - Understanding 3D Data Videos: From Screens to Virtual Reality has been accepted by PacificVis 2023
I have passed my PhD defense. Call me Dr. Yang! ;)
Our paper - Is It the End? Guidelines for Cinematic Endings in Data Videos has been accepted by ACM CHI 2023. Congrats to Xian Xu!
Our paper - From Wow to Why: Guidelines for Creating the Opening of a Data Video with Cinematic Styles has been accepted by ACM CHI 2022. Congrats to Xian Xu!
Our paper - Explaining with Examples: Lessons Learned from Crowdsourced Introductory Description of Information Visualizations has been accepted by IEEE TVCG.
Our paper - A Design Space for Applying the Freytag's Pyramid Structure to Data Stories has been accepted by IEEE VIS 2022
Visit Prof. Can Nan @Tongji University, iDVx Lab.
I have passed the PhD qualification exam and now I am a PhD candidate!
My first co-authored paper - CloudDet: Interactive Visual Analysis of Anomalous Performances in Cloud Computing Systems has been accepted by IEEE VIS 2019. I learned a lot from Ke Xu.
I start my research journey at HKUST.
